name: nutritrack
description: NutriTrack — Free Health & Meal Tracking App

scripts.build:
node -e "if(!process.env.SUPABASE_URL || !process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) { console.error('

❌ ERROR: SUPABASE_URL or SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is missing in Vercel Environment Variables!

'); process.exit(1); } const fs=require('fs'); let c=fs.readFileSync('js/config.js','utf8'); c=c.replace('https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co', process.env.SUPABASE_URL).replace('YOUR_ANON_KEY', process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY); fs.writeFileSync('js/config.js',c);"
